strings.settings.title: Saituna
strings.settings.subtitle: Zaɓuɓɓukan Aikace-aikace
strings.lang.title: Harshe
strings.lang.intro: An riga an girka harsunan farko. Zazzage harshensa don cikakken fassara ba tare da intanet ba — bayanai, tatsuniyoyi da ƙari.
strings.lang.failed: Zazzagewa ya kasa. Duba haɗin gwiwa kuma sake gwadawa.
strings.settings.night.desc: Ja mai zurfi yana kare idanu da suka saba da duhu — haske ja yana shafar ganin dare kadan, sama tana ci gaba da haskakawa.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: Yana zama jan atomatik ne lokacin da sama ta yi duhu bayan faduwar rana.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Rawar jiki lokacin da aka kulle zuwa manufa.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Karanta manufa da jagorori da ƙara sauti — don amfani ba tare da hannaye ba da makafi.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Daidaita kaɗan don layin ƙungiyoyin taurari da hanyoyin tauraron wuta su daidaita da sama na gaske.
strings.settings.about.credits: An gina tare da astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.pro.badCode: Wannan lamba bai yi aiki ba.
strings.paywall.title: Buɗe Dukan Sama
strings.paywall.subtitle: Siya sau ɗaya. Babu kuɗin shiga na wata-wata, babu asusun — naka har abada, cikakken ba intanet ba.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Dukan taurari, ƙungiyoyi da tauraron wuta
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Na'urar Lokaci — duba sama kowace rana
strings.paywall.feature.events: Abubuwan sama — husuf, ruwan taurari, haɗuwa
strings.paywall.comingSoon: Siyayya za a bude nan ba da jimawa ba — yi amfani da lambar buɗewa yanzu.
strings.paywall.error: Wani abu ya kuskure. Sake gwadawa.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: Ba a sami siya na baya ba.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Zaɓi manufa don nemo a sama
strings.stars.title: Taurari
strings.stars.subtitle: Taurari {n} masu suna da haske mafi yawa
strings.deepsky.title: Sama Mai Zurfi
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Taurari {n}, nebula, galaxy da ƙungiyoyi
strings.constellations.title: Ƙungiyoyin Taurari
strings.constellations.subtitle: Tsarin taurari {n} masu suna
strings.satellites.title: Tauraron Wuta
strings.events.title: Abubuwan Sama
strings.events.subtitle: Abin da ke zuwa — Taɓa don tafiya a lokaci
strings.search.name: Nema da suna…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: Babu mafiya so — Buɗe abu, taɓa ★ don ƙara.
strings.list.empty.visible: Babu abin da ke sama da sarari yanzu — Gwada "Nuna Duka".
strings.list.empty.search: Babu abin da ya dace da bincikanka.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: Babu taurari a jerin sama da sarari yanzu.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: Babu abubuwan sama mai zurfi sama da sarari yanzu.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: Babu ɗayan waɗannan ƙungiyoyi sama da sarari yanzu.
strings.sat.overhead: ● Ana iya gani yanzu — Duba Sama!
strings.sat.overheadShadow: Sama yanzu amma a cikin inuwar Duniya
strings.sat.noPass: Babu wucewar da za a iya gani soon
strings.sat.offline: Ba Intanet — Bayanan da aka Girka
strings.fav.empty:
Babu mafiya so.
Buɗe kowane tauraro ko taurari, taɓa ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: Babu ɗayan mafiyar sona sama da sarari yanzu.
strings.fav.noMatch: Babu mafiya so da ya dace da bincikanka.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} yana ƙasa da sararin ƙasa — Yi nuni ƙasa ta cikin Duniya.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} ba sama yanzu ba — Taɓa bayani don wucewar gaba.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Tafiya ta Lokaci: {when} — Taɓa don komawa yanzu
strings.point.permBody: Planet Pointer yana nuna kibiya a kan bidiyo kai tsaye don nuna {name}.
strings.info.passNote: Lokacin gida. Tsawo mafi sama = haske, sauƙin wuce.
strings.ev.lunarSub: Wata yana wuce ta cikin inuwar Duniya
strings.time.title: Na'urar Lokaci
strings.time.subtitle: Duba sama kowace rana ko lokaci.
